---
title: "Exercise 11: Recap, exam preparation, Q&A"
---

::: callout-note
TODO
:::


## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 11 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 11 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_11.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_11.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
